title: Get the spike e2e smoke to GREEN
description: Goal-directed task: keep iterating on the cluster state until the spike e2e smoke passes with diagnosis attached. Codex has authority to debug, retry, fix things, and only hands back when the expected_state is reached or max_iterations is exhausted.

expected_state.description: spike_e2e_assert.py exits 0 with the GREEN banner (diagnosis.source set, diagnosis.confidence > 0)
expected_state.verify_shell: NOETL_BASE='${NOETL_BASE:-http://localhost:8082}'; EXEC_ID=$(noetl exec tests/spike/spike_e2e_test --runtime distributed --payload '{"escalate_to":"none"}' --json | jq -r '.execution_id'); sleep 20; curl -s "$NOETL_BASE/api/executions/$EXEC_ID" > /tmp/spike_check.json; python3 /Volumes/X10/projects/noetl/ai-meta/scripts/spike_e2e_assert.py /tmp/spike_check.json | tee /tmp/spike_assert.out | tail -1

hints: If smoke is AMBER: check whether mcp/ollama is registered (`noetl catalog list Mcp`); if missing, register it from repos/noetl/noetl/tools/ollama_bridge/catalog_template.yaml.
If bridge returns 422: bump the bridge image to v2.35.2 (FastAPI route fix); see playbooks/ai_os_spike_e2e_smoke.md.
If Ollama doesn't have gemma2:2b: pull it via `kubectl exec deploy/ollama -- ollama pull gemma2:2b`.
After every iteration, run the verify_shell. When it matches success_pattern, stop and report.
If you can't get to GREEN within max_iterations, hand back with the last verify output + a description of what was tried.
